Our Story

Bridging the Artisan Accessibility Gap in Cavite

CASMYR (pronounced "Cashmere") is a hybrid wholesale café and artisan pastry — a one-stop shop where premium café experiences meet high-volume production. We serve both walk-in customers and business partners, delivering artisan quality at warehouse prices.

Our central hub in Vermosa ensures quality is controlled at the source, while our B2B arm keeps high-volume turnover seamless and reliable for local SMEs across Cavite.

500sqm Lot Size
28%Net Profit Margin
B2C+B2BDual Channel
1.46yrPayback Period

For Businesses

Your Reliable Wholesale Partner

  • Bulk OrdersConsistent supply of artisan pastries & specialty coffee beans for cafés, restaurants, hotels & offices
  • Scheduled DeliveryReliable commissary delivery van service across Cavite — timely, every time
  • CASMYR Business ClubExclusive loyalty program — priority supply, special rates & dedicated account support
  • Quality Guaranteed55–65% gross margins on pastries, FIFO inventory & strict food safety compliance

Partner With CASMYR

Join Cavite’s growing network of businesses sourcing artisan pastries and specialty coffee from a single trusted hub. No Manila logistics markup — quality at the source.

₱250K/mo avg. wholesale revenue
